suite.name: Api Tests

test.name: Health Reports OK And Rule-Based Mode

kw.msg: HTTP Request: POST http://testserver/api/generate "HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request"

kw.msg: ${body} = {'error': {'code': 'validation_error', 'message': 'api_spec.fields must contain at least one field to generate data for.'}}

suite.doc: End-to-end API tests for the AI Test Data Generator. Runs offline against the FastAPI app via Starlette's TestClient (no live server needed). With no API key set, the app uses the deterministic rule-based engine.

suite.name: Generation Data

kw.name: Generate From Sample
Load Sample Request
kw.msg: ${req} = {'user_story': 'As a new user, I want to register an account with my email, a strong password, and my age so that I can access the platform. Users must be at least 18 years old.', 'api_spec': {'method...

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
POST the bundled sample request and return the generated artifacts.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

kw.name: Generate From Sample
Load Sample Request
kw.msg: ${req} = {'user_story': 'As a new user, I want to register an account with my email, a strong password, and my age so that I can access the platform. Users must be at least 18 years old.', 'api_spec': {'method...

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
POST the bundled sample request and return the generated artifacts.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${statements} = ["INSERT INTO users (email, username, password, age, role) VALUES ('user0@example.com', 'username', 'password', 18, 'user');", "INSERT INTO users (email, username, password, age, role) VALUES ('user1@...
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

iter.var: INSERT INTO users (email, username, password, age, role) VALUES ('user0@example.com', 'username', 'password', 18, 'user');

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

iter.var: INSERT INTO users (email, username, password, age, role) VALUES ('user1@example.com', 'username', 'password', 19, 'admin');

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

iter.var: INSERT INTO users (email, username, password, age, role) VALUES ('user2@example.com', 'username', 'password', 20, 'editor');

kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

test.name: Exports Include A Runnable Pytest Module

kw.name: Generate From Sample
Load Sample Request
kw.msg: ${req} = {'user_story': 'As a new user, I want to register an account with my email, a strong password, and my age so that I can access the platform. Users must be at least 18 years old.', 'api_spec': {'method...

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
POST the bundled sample request and return the generated artifacts.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg:
${py} = """Auto-generated API tests by the AI Test Data Generator.
Target: POST /api/v1/users Run: pip install pytest requests && pytest generated_api_test.py Set BASE_URL to point at your environment. ""...
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg:
${script} = """Auto-generated API checks by the AI Test Data Generator.
Target: POST /api/v1/users Run: pip install requests && python generated_api_checks.py Exits non-zero if any case fails. Set BASE_URL to...
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

suite.doc: Verifies the six generated artifact categories and the Robot Framework / Playwright export formats. Offline via the rule-based engine (TestClient, no live server, no API key).
